content:
Hey extremely new to contributing to linux, rust for linux. This might be more of a workflow problem.
Some of the issues seem to have someone who said they would work on it, but the comment is over a month old. Normally I would assume if there wasn't a linked PR, it wasn't being worked on, but not all, or probably even most, of the development is happening on github. Is there a good way to check PRs on or off github associated with a specific issue?
please see https://rust-for-linux.com/contributing#the-kernel-development-process kernel development doesn't really happen via GitHub PRs
